title: Fast Xp
description: A client side mod that throws xp faster.
body:
A lightweight client-side mod that speeds up XP bottle usage by resending the use-item packet every tick while you hold right-click. Works with both main hand and offhand XP bottles automatically and seamlessly. 

### **Multiplayer Warning: ⚠️**
This use of this mod may be a bannable offense on some servers. Please check server rules before using this mod. **This mod is bannable on _mcpvp_!**
